full_text:
Shao Nan 邵南
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shao Nan (邵南). Treated like a son by Zhou Fang, and sent to deceive Cao Xiu. Shao Nan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
